    Method
    Description
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.any(Traversal<T>... alternatives)
    Composes the given hops, resulting in a hop that will result the object returned by the first successful alternative.
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.attributeValued(F attribute, Object value)
     
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.bubbleUp(Traversal<T> base)
    A traversal that attempts to perform the given traversal in the scope or any parent scope.

    Traversal.Provider.compose(Traversal<T>... hops)

    Traversal.Provider.compose(Stream<Traversal<T>> hops)
    Returns a hop that is equivalent to performing a sequence of hops.

    Traversal.Provider.search(F feature, int offset, Object... path)
    Builds a traversal that tries to find an object that has the given value(s).

    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.self()
     
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.then(Traversal<T> another)
    Composes this hop and another hop so the result is the same as hop2(hop1(c)).
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.to(T target)
    Creates a constant hop that always traverses to the given target object.
    default Traversal<T>
    Traversal.Provider.withValue(F feature, Object value)
